hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git add.*(\.(tif|vrt|pth|jp2)|tiles/|results/|checkpoints/)' && echo 'BLOCKED: 禁止 git add 大文件或数据目录' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
bash -c '[[ "$TOOL_INPUT" == *CLAUDE.md* || "$TOOL_INPUT" == *AGENTS.md* || "$TOOL_INPUT" == *README.md* ]] && echo "REMINDER: 你修改了入口文档，记得同步 CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / README.md 的稳定骨架" >&2; exit 0'
